summary: Audited the project form button source path and confirmed that parser extraction is non-empty while app.view.config.get_contract_api(...) is empty, so the live buttons are being reintroduced later in the ui.contract delivery chain.
next_suggestion: Open the next backend diagnosis batch to inspect the ui.contract handler / load_contract delivery path and determine exactly where the three live project form buttons are injected after get_contract_api(...) returns empty buttons.
